de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Interface Declaration

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, SVSubstitute
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IProgramMethod, MemberDeclaration, ProgramConstruct
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ArrayDeclaration, ClassDeclaration, ClassInitializer, ConstructorDeclaration, EnumClassDeclaration, FieldDeclaration, InterfaceDeclaration, JavaDeclaration, LocalVariableDeclaration, MethodDeclaration, ParameterDeclaration, ProgramMethod, ProgramSV, SuperArrayDeclaration, TypeDeclaration, VariableDeclaration

    public interface Declaration
extends NonTerminalProgramElement
    Declaration. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure
